calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Laurie Shigekuni Gong and Martha Bridegam for and with Elizabeth Schneider.

The Court stated before it today is a Petition to Terminate Administration for Lack of Assets and for Discharge of Elizabeth Schneider as Successor Administrator and that this petition is after the final distribution order but where the former administrator has passed away. Ms. Shigekuni Gong stated that they had put in over one hundred hours, that they would like a formal discharge, and that they would like everything to be formally closed. The Court inquired if anyone needed a formal order. Ms. Shigekuni Gong stated the Paul Fazio the bondsman was in court today. Ms. Bridegam stated that the bond was "taken off the books". Ms. Shigekuni Gong stated that the bond stays open until there's a court order. Ms. Shigekuni Gong briefly addressed the initial attempt to close the estate which was prior to Dora's death and at the time was presented on Dora's behalf by her agent under a durable power of attorney. Brief discussions are held. At the conclusion of discussions, the Court took the matter under submission. Discussions regarding the proposed order are held. The Court stated that it would draft something with language that it was comfortable with and that it would proceed with the order that was submitted to the Court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Matter not reported.

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Grabstein for and with Claudia Ponce Ramos. Laurie Shigekuni Gong for and with Dora Gallardo.

The Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement was granted (subject to review of the order). The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed filed by Claudia Ramos is dismissed with prejudice. The Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Dora Gallardo was granted with limited authority (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $120,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-07-2011 Continued To Feb-22-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Grabstein for and with Claudia Ponce. Laurie Shigekuni and Martha Bridegam for and with Dora Gallardo.

Mr. Grabstein requested a continuance for notice and publication of his petition. Counsel agreed to the appointment of Dora Gallardo as Special Administrator (order for the same signed). Bond is set at $450,000.00. The Special Administrator is not to alter the tenancies. The Parties agreed to engage in mediation but will do some discovery. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 17, 2012. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 17, 2012. The Petitions for Letters of Administration were continued to and the Parties are to return on February 22, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation and for setting.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip.
